verification.subject: Verify your FIX Space account
verification.body:
Please verify your email address by clicking the link below:

{link}

This link will expire in 24 hours.

If you did not create this account, you can safely ignore this email.

Best regards,
The FIX Space Team
verification.htmlSubtitle: Confirm your identity to activate your account.
verification.htmlExpiry: This link will expire in 24 hours.
verification.htmlFallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
verification.htmlIgnore: If you didn't create a FIX Space account, you can safely ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your FIX Space password
passwordReset.body:
You requested a password reset.

Click the link below to set a new password:

{link}

This link expires in 1 hour.

If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
passwordReset.htmlSubtitle: Click the button below to set a new password. This link expires in 1 hour.
passwordReset.htmlIgnore: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
